general_information.slurm_script:
#!/bin/bash
########################################################
#            This script was generated using           #
#             slurm-script-generator v0.3.4            #
# https://github.com/max-models/slurm-script-generator #
#      `pip install slurm-script-generator==0.3.4`     #
########################################################

########################################################
# Pragmas for Job Config                               #
#SBATCH --job-name=profiling_diocotron_poisson_scaling # name of job
#SBATCH --account=FUSIO_HLST_7                         # charge job to specified account
#SBATCH --partition=dcgp_fua_dbg                       # partition requested
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Time And Priority                        #
#SBATCH --time=00:15:00                                # time limit
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Io And Directory                         #
#SBATCH --output=./%x.%j.out                           # File to redirect output (%%x=jobname, %%j=jobid)
#SBATCH --error=./%x.%j.err                            # File to redirect error (%%x=jobname, %%j=jobid)
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Notifications                            #
#SBATCH --mail-type=none                               # notify on state change
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Core Node And Task Allocation            #
#SBATCH --nodes=1                                      # number of nodes on which to run
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=8                            # number of tasks to invoke on each node
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=1                              # number of cpus required per task
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Memory                                   #
#SBATCH --mem-per-cpu=8GB                              # maximum amount of real memory per allocated cpu
########################################################
module purge
source ./setup/modules.sh load
module list
source /pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/.venv-fortran/bin/activate
echo "----------------------------------------"
echo "Running profiling case: diocotron_poisson_scaling"
echo "Description: Scaling test running the diocotron profiling setup with multiple MPI ranks."
echo "Physics problem: Diocotron instability in a non-neutral plasma."
echo "Struphy model used: ToyDrift"
echo "Case directory: /pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling"
pwd
echo "----------------------------------------"
mkdir -p "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling"
cp "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/examples/ToyGyrokinetic/diocotron_instability/params_diocotron.py" "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/parameters.py"
ls -l "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling"
echo "===== Diagnostics ====="
pwd
which python
python --version
which mpirun
echo "VIRTUAL_ENV=$VIRTUAL_ENV"
echo "PATH=$PATH"
echo "======================="
srun -n1 hostname
srun -n1 python -c "print('hello')"
srun -n1 mpirun -n1 hostname
existing_h5_files=()

echo "Running diocotron_poisson_scaling with 2 MPI ranks"
if srun -n 2 python profiling/run_diocotron.py 2 --out-root "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling" > "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks2.log" 2>&1; then
    echo "srun (2 ranks) succeeded"
else
    echo "srun (2 ranks) FAILED with exit code $?; log follows:"
    cat "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks2.log"
fi
if [ -f "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks2/profiling_data.h5" ]; then
    scope-profiler pproc "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks2/profiling_data.h5" -o "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks2"
    existing_h5_files+=("/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks2/profiling_data.h5")
else
    echo "No profiling data found at /pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks2/profiling_data.h5; skipping scope-profiler pproc for this rank count."
fi

echo "Running diocotron_poisson_scaling with 4 MPI ranks"
if srun -n 4 python profiling/run_diocotron.py 4 --out-root "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling" > "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks4.log" 2>&1; then
    echo "srun (4 ranks) succeeded"
else
    echo "srun (4 ranks) FAILED with exit code $?; log follows:"
    cat "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks4.log"
fi
if [ -f "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks4/profiling_data.h5" ]; then
    scope-profiler pproc "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks4/profiling_data.h5" -o "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks4"
    existing_h5_files+=("/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks4/profiling_data.h5")
else
    echo "No profiling data found at /pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks4/profiling_data.h5; skipping scope-profiler pproc for this rank count."
fi

echo "Running diocotron_poisson_scaling with 8 MPI ranks"
if srun -n 8 python profiling/run_diocotron.py 8 --out-root "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling" > "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks8.log" 2>&1; then
    echo "srun (8 ranks) succeeded"
else

    cat "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks8.log"
fi
if [ -f "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks8/profiling_data.h5" ]; then
    scope-profiler pproc "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks8/profiling_data.h5" -o "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/sim_ranks8"

echo "Completed profiling case: diocotron_poisson_scaling"
echo "----------------------------------------"
# Postprocessing comparison plots
if [ "${#existing_h5_files[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then
    scope-profiler pproc "${existing_h5_files[@]}" --rank 0 -o "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/figures"

name: Diocotron instability
description:
The Diocotron instability is a shear-driven instability that occurs in non-neutral plasmas confined by a magnetic field. 
It typically appears when there is velocity shear in the E×B drift of a plasma column.

The parameter of this simulation file is based on a paper called:

'A new fully two-dimensional conservative semi-Lagrangian
method: applications on polar grids, from diocotron instability
to ITG turbulence'

DOI: 10.1140/epjd/e2014-50180-9

profiling_case_info.test_case_description: Scaling test running the diocotron profiling setup with multiple MPI ranks.
profiling_case_info.physics_problem: Diocotron instability in a non-neutral plasma.
profiling_case_info.slurm_script:
#!/bin/bash
########################################################
#            This script was generated using           #
#             slurm-script-generator v0.3.4            #
# https://github.com/max-models/slurm-script-generator #
#      `pip install slurm-script-generator==0.3.4`     #
########################################################

########################################################
# Pragmas for Job Config                               #
#SBATCH --job-name=profiling_diocotron_poisson_scaling # name of job
#SBATCH --account=FUSIO_HLST_7                         # charge job to specified account
#SBATCH --partition=dcgp_fua_dbg                       # partition requested
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Time And Priority                        #
#SBATCH --time=00:15:00                                # time limit
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Io And Directory                         #
#SBATCH --output=./%x.%j.out                           # File to redirect output (%%x=jobname, %%j=jobid)

#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=8                            # number of tasks to invoke on each node
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=1                              # number of cpus required per task
#                                                      #
# Pragmas for Memory                                   #
#SBATCH --mem-per-cpu=8GB                              # maximum amount of real memory per allocated cpu
########################################################
module purge
source ./setup/modules.sh load
module list
source /pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/.venv-fortran/bin/activate
echo "----------------------------------------"
echo "Running profiling case: diocotron_poisson_scaling"
echo "Description: Scaling test running the diocotron profiling setup with multiple MPI ranks."
echo "Physics problem: Diocotron instability in a non-neutral plasma."
echo "Struphy model used: ToyDrift"

echo "----------------------------------------"

cp "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/examples/ToyGyrokinetic/diocotron_instability/params_diocotron.py" "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/parameters.py"
ls -l "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling"
echo "===== Diagnostics ====="
pwd
which python
python --version
which mpirun
echo "VIRTUAL_ENV=$VIRTUAL_ENV"
echo "PATH=$PATH"
echo "======================="
srun -n1 hostname
srun -n1 python -c "print('hello')"
srun -n1 mpirun -n1 hostname
existing_h5_files=()

echo "Running diocotron_poisson_scaling with 2 MPI ranks"
if srun -n 2 python profiling/run_diocotron.py 2 --out-root "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling" > "/pitagora/home/userexternal/mlindqvi/git_repos/struphy/results/profiling/20260722T121819Z-521bb16c/diocotron_poisson_scaling/mpirun_ranks2.log" 2>&1; then
    echo "srun (2 ranks) succeeded"
else
    echo "srun (2 ranks) FAILED with exit code $?; log follows:"
